current_assortment_gaps: Lightweight trail running footwear and PFAS-free waterproofing
supply_chain_constraints: Limited access to specialist ultralight suppliers
strategic_expansion_focus: Lightweight trail running and ultralight backpacking systems
strategic_rationale: Growing demand among millennials and urban hikers; margin and differentiation opportunity
strategic_assortment_gaps: Plated super-shoes, ultralight packs under 500g, modular kit systems, PFAS-free DWR shells
extra: Premium innovation appetite; willing to pilot specialist brands.
